step_1.title: Choose dates
step_1.description: Enter dates, guest count, and contact information.

step_2.title: Choose how to hold
step_2.description: Request advice or hold your spot with an online deposit.

step_3.title: Confirm
step_3.description: Our team checks availability and sends the next instructions.

booking.title: Book Your Stay
booking.cta_deposit: Hold spot and get deposit instructions
booking.consultation_description: Our team will contact you by WhatsApp or email to confirm itinerary, price, and availability.
booking.deposit_description: Create a hold request. Our consultant confirms availability, then sends the suitable payment instructions.
booking.deposit_slider_help: Drag to choose from 10% to 100% of the booking value.
booking.payment_link_note: A payment link or QR code will be sent after our consultant confirms availability and itinerary.
booking.discount_hint: Our consultant will verify the promo code before confirming the final price.
booking.after_submit_note: Your booking is recorded immediately. If you choose a deposit, our consultant will confirm availability and send payment instructions for the estimated amount of {{amount}}.
booking.invalid_dates: The return date must be after the start date
booking.choose_dates_for_total: Choose dates to see the estimated total
booking.note_discount_code: Customer entered promo code: {{code}} (CRM verification required).
booking.note_auto_split: System auto-split this request into {{count}} {{unit}} based on guest count.
booking.inventory_available: At least {{count}} {{unit}} remain for these dates.
booking.inventory_unavailable: There is not enough availability for the selected guests and dates. Please choose another date or option.
booking.payment_session_created_description: Booking {{code}} has been created. Please complete payment in the next step.
booking.hold_created_description: Our consultant will send payment instructions after confirming availability.
booking.consultation_sent_description: Consultation request for {{name}} has been sent.

success.title: Thank you, your payment has been recorded
success.description: Your booking is being verified by our travel team. We will contact you by WhatsApp or email to confirm the itinerary and service details.
next_steps: Keep your phone and email available so our consultant can confirm during working hours.
Keep the booking code or payment reference ready if we need to reconcile the transaction.
Do not pay again if your account has already been charged.

error.title: The transaction was not completed
error.description: SePay has not confirmed this payment. You can try again or send the details to our team by WhatsApp or email for support.
next_steps: Check your network connection, account balance, and transaction limit.
If your account was charged, keep the receipt or transaction reference.
Contact our team before repeating a high-value payment.

cancel.title: You left the payment step
cancel.description: This booking has not been confirmed by online payment. If you still want to hold the spot, return to the trip page or contact our team by WhatsApp or email.
next_steps: You can choose the trip again and create a new request when you are ready.
Our team can still help check availability and payment options.
No new payment was recorded from this cancelled attempt.

payment_result.support_note: If you need support, send your booking code or receipt by WhatsApp or email so our team can check faster.

payment_checkout.title: Complete payment for booking {{bookingCode}}
payment_checkout.missing_description: This payment session exists only in this browser after a booking is created. Please go back to the trip and create a new payment request.
payment_checkout.form_description: This checkout is prepared inside An Voyages. When you continue, we securely send the signed payment form to SePay so you can complete the transaction.
payment_checkout.submit_description: SePay will process the payment and return you to An Voyages when the transaction is completed, failed, or canceled.
payment_checkout.gateway_note: For security reasons, the final bank/QR payment step is handled on SePay's gateway after this form is submitted.
